ideation: This animation sequence depicts a robot interacting with a file cabinet, implying actions like opening, searching, or retrieving files.  The movement will be deliberate and methodical, reflecting careful handling of important documents.  The robot will use both arms, mimicking actions of someone working with a file cabinet.  The lack of elbows in the robot arm design will require creative use of shoulder joints and wrist rotations to simulate the intended actions. The first frame will show arms at rest. The second frame will show one arm reaching out to the file cabinet, the third will show both arms interacting with the file cabinet, and the fourth will show the robot retrieving a file, and the last frame will show the robot returning to rest.

frames.beat: arms hang at sides, ready for work
left arm reaches out to the cabinet
both arms open drawers, searching carefully
left arm pulls out a file, right arm waits
both arms return to a resting position
